name: @hauntapi/mcp-server
description: Structured web extraction for AI agents. Pass a permitted public URL and a plain-English prompt, get clean JSON or Markdown back. MCP-native, no-key demo, 1,000 free credits/month, and failed extractions do not burn credits.

tools.name: try_demo_extract
tools.description: No-key activation check returning fixed sample extraction JSON/trace, docs, signup, pricing, and free-tier links.

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Alias for extract_url. Extract structured JSON by default from a permitted public URL, with optional Markdown/raw HTML response_format.

tools.name: extract_url
tools.description: Extract structured JSON by default from a permitted public URL. Optional response_format can return Markdown or raw HTML.

tools.name: extract_markdown
tools.description: Return clean Markdown from a permitted public page for agents, RAG ingestion, notes, and .md files.

tools.name: extract_article
tools.description: Extract article fields when the article is publicly accessible.

tools.name: extract_metadata
tools.description: Extract page metadata, Open Graph tags, Twitter Card tags, and canonical URL.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Check current plan, monthly credit limit, used credits, reserved credits, and remaining credits.
